message.content:
@startuml
title **Weekly Rewards to Vaults**

actor User
actor Ops
participant "«mStable»\nEmissions Controller" as EC
participant "«mStable»\nVaults" as Vaults
participant "«mStable»\nMTA" as MTA

User -> EC : setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
note right of EC : proportions voting power across dials\nfor future distributions
EC --> User

== After Thursday 00:00 UTC ==

Ops -> EC : calculateRewards ()
note right of EC : Calculates and stores\nrewards for each dial
EC --> Ops

Ops -> EC : distributeRewards ([dial ids])

loop [Dials]
  note left of EC : transfer MTA\nfrom Emissions Controller\nto Vault
  EC -> MTA : transfer(vault, rewards)
  MTA --> EC
  EC -> Vaults : notifyRewardAmount(rewards)
  note right of Vaults : Stream MTA to Users
  Vaults --> EC
end

EC --> Ops

== After rewards have accrued ==

User -> Vaults : claimRewards ()
note right of Vaults : transfer MTA\nfrom Vault\nto User
Vaults -> MTA : transfer(user, rewards)
MTA --> Vaults
Vaults --> User

@enduml
